faculty: Faculty of Science, Engineering and Agriculture

qualifications.name: Bachelor of Agriculture
notes: Programme code(s): SCBAGR.
Streams: Agricultural Economics, Animal Science, Crop Science.

Faculty career opportunities: Agricultural Scientist; Agricultural Economist; Agronomist; Animal Scientist; Crop Scientist; Environmental Scientist; Ecologist; Hydrologist; GIS Specialist; Geologist; Mining Geologist; Urban and Regional Planner; Software Developer; Systems Analyst; Data Analyst; Statistician; Biotechnologist; Microbiologist; Chemist; Physicist; Research Scientist; Civil Engineer; Electrical Engineer; Environmental Consultant.
Additional UNIVEN requirements: NSC 30; Adequate achievement in English; Adequate achievement in Life Sciences OR Agricultural Sciences; Adequate achievement in Mathematics.

qualifications.name: Bachelor of Environmental Sciences
notes: Programme code(s): SCBES.
Streams: Geography, Hydrology, Ecology, Environmental Management.

Faculty career opportunities: Agricultural Scientist; Agricultural Economist; Agronomist; Animal Scientist; Crop Scientist; Environmental Scientist; Ecologist; Hydrologist; GIS Specialist; Geologist; Mining Geologist; Urban and Regional Planner; Software Developer; Systems Analyst; Data Analyst; Statistician; Biotechnologist; Microbiologist; Chemist; Physicist; Research Scientist; Civil Engineer; Electrical Engineer; Environmental Consultant.
Additional UNIVEN requirements: NSC 30; Adequate achievement in English; Adequate achievement in Geography; Adequate achievement in Mathematics.

qualifications.name: Bachelor of Science
notes: Programme code(s): SCBSC.
Streams: Biochemistry, Biotechnology, Botany, Chemistry, Computer Science, Mathematics, Microbiology, Physics, Statistics, Zoology.

Additional UNIVEN requirements: NSC 30; Adequate achievement in English; Adequate achievement in Mathematics; Adequate achievement in Physical Sciences.

Additional UNIVEN requirements: NSC 30; Adequate achievement in English; Adequate achievement in Mathematics; Adequate achievement in Physical Sciences; Geography recommended.

qualifications.name: Extended BSc Programme
notes: Programme code(s): SCEBSC.

Faculty career opportunities: Agricultural Scientist; Agricultural Economist; Agronomist; Animal Scientist; Crop Scientist; Environmental Scientist; Ecologist; Hydrologist; GIS Specialist; Geologist; Mining Geologist; Urban and Regional Planner; Software Developer; Systems Analyst; Data Analyst; Statistician; Biotechnologist; Microbiologist; Chemist; Physicist; Research Scientist; Civil Engineer; Electrical Engineer; Environmental Consultant.
